question_text: An unpolarized incident light of intensity I_0 = 204 W/m^2 passes through a sequence of two polarizers placed along the x-axis. The axis of the first polarizer is 30 degrees from the z-axis and the second polarizer is at a relative angle of 45 degrees from the first one. Obtain the final intensity. What will be the final intensity if the first polarizer is removed?
question_latex: \text{An unpolarized incident light of intensity } I_{0}=204~\text{W/m}^{2} \text{ passes through a sequence of two polarizers placed along the x-axis. The axis of the first polarizer is } 30^{\circ} \text{ from the z-axis and the second polarizer is at a relative angle of } 45^{\circ} \text{ from the first one. Obtain the final intensity. What will be the final intensity if the first polarizer is removed?}
